zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine De Riley於1378年出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德利丁米爾時，她的父親William de Riley25歲，母親Margaret Toothill40歲。她與Sir George Sampson結婚。她去世於1437年10月5日在英國英格蘭賀特福爾享年59歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀特福爾薩布利其沃斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine De Riley于1378年出生在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德利丁米爾时，她的父亲William de Riley25岁，母亲Margaret Toothill40岁。她与Sir George Sampson结婚。她去世于1437年10月5日在英国英格兰賀特福爾享年59岁，埋葬在英国英格兰賀特福爾薩布利其沃斯。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Riley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): habitational name chiefly from High Ryley in Accrington (Lancashire) and Riley in Kirkburton, which was in the manor of Wakefield (Yorkshire). In some cases the name may derive from Riley Farm in Eyam (Derbyshire), Royley in Royton (Lancashire), or Rylah in Scarcliffe (Derbyshire). The placenames all come from Old English rȳge ‘rye’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

Irish: from Ó Raghailligh ‘descendant of Raghailleach’, Old Irish Roghallach. This is the name of a chieftain family in Cavan, related to the O'Rourkes. In Anglicized form it has also been confused with Ó Raithile found in Munster, usually Anglicized as O'Rahilly or Rahilly . See O'Reilly .

variants.name: Reily
meanings: Irish: variant of   Riley  .

variants.name: Raleigh
meanings: English: habitational name from Raleigh (House) in Pilton (Devon), recorded as Radeleia in 1086 and Rawlegh in 1535. The placename probably derives from Old English rǣge ‘roe deer’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
Irish: variant of   Riley  .

History: The English explorer Sir Walter Raleigh (1554–1618) was born in Hayes Barton, Devon, into a family of Devon gentry. He was related to most of the West Country's important families, including that of Sir Francis Drake. His half-brother was the explorer Sir Humphrey Gilbert. In 1578 Raleigh was granted a patent to explore and colonize “unknown lands” in America. In the 1580s he was granted extensive estates in Munster (Ireland), in reward for his suppression of the Desmond Rebellions.

variants.name: Rawley
meanings: Irish: variant of   Riley  .
English and Irish: variant of   Raleigh  .

variants.name: Rilea
meanings: Altered form of Irish   Riley  .

variants.name: Rahilly
meanings: Irish (Kerry and Cork): perhaps from Ó Raghailligh (see Reilly ), but more likely from the surname Ó Raithile ‘descendant of Raithile’, a personal name of unexplained etymology. This surname is common in Munster, where it is also Anglicized as O'Rahilly.

variants.name: Rowley
meanings: English: habitational name from one or more of various places called Rowley or Rowly, such as Rowley Regis (Staffordshire), Rowley (Devon, Durham), Rowleygreen Farm (Hertfordshire), Rowly (Surrey), Rowley (East Yorkshire), Rowley, near Bardsey (Yorkshire), Rowley in Lepton (Yorkshire), and Rowley Hill (Essex). The placenames probably all derive from Old English rūh ‘rough’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’, though the East Yorkshire place may have been named with hlāw ‘mound, hill’ as the second element.
Irish: from Ó Roghallaigh, a variant of Ó Raghailligh. See Riley and O'Reilly .

variants.name: Rylee
meanings: Perhaps an altered form of Riley or German Reile, Reihle, variants of Reil .

variants.name: Reel
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Raghaill ‘descendant of Raghall’, a short form of the personal name Raghailleach; see Riley and compare Riel .
Americanized form of German   Riehl  .

Flemish: from a short form of the ancient Germanic personal name Radilo, itself a short form of a compound name formed with rād ‘counsel, advice’ as the first element, for example Radolf (see Ralph ).

variants.name: Relihan
meanings: Irish (Cork): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Roileacháin ‘descendant of Roileachán’. Roileachán is a diminutive of the name Roghallach (see Riley ).

variants.name: Rielly
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Bridie.
English and Scottish: variant of   Riley  .
Irish: variant of   Reilly  ; see   O'Reilly  .

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Katherine .

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine De Riley was born in 1378, in Ridingmill, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, her father, William de Riley, was 25 and her mother, Margaret Toothill, was 40. She married Sir George Sampson. She died on 5 October 1437, in Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 59, and was buried in Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine De Riley est née en 1378, à Ridingmill, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Riley, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Margaret Toothill, avait 40 ans. Elle a épousé Sir George Sampson. Elle est décédée le 5 octobre 1437, à Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterrée à Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Katherine De Riley 1378 in Ridingmill, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Riley 25 und ihre Mutter Margaret Toothill 40. Sie hat Sir George Sampson geheiratet. Sie starb am 5. Oktober 1437 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine De Riley è nata il nel 1378 nel Ridingmill, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William de Riley, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Margaret Toothill, aveva 40 anni. Lei sposato Sir George Sampson. Morì il 5 ottobre 1437, nel Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolta a Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine De Rileyが1378年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドリディングミルで生まれた時，父William de Rileyは25歳，母Margaret Toothillは40歳であった。Sir George Sampsonと結婚した。彼女は1437年10月5日にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアで59歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアサウブリジェウオルスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine De Riley(이)가 1378년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 리딩미에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Riley(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Toothill(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 Sir George Sampson(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1437년 10월 5일 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 사w브리지워스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine De Riley nasceu em 1378, em Ridingmill, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de Riley, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Toothill, tinha 40 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir George Sampson. Ela faleceu em 5 de outubro de 1437, em Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 59 anos, e foi sepultada em Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine De Riley родилась в 1378 г. в местности ридингмилл, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William de Riley было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Toothill, 40. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir George Sampson. Она умерла 5 октября 1437 г. в местности хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 59 лет и была похоронена в местности савбриджюорт, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Katherine De Riley nació en 1378, en Ridingmill, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William de Riley, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Margaret Toothill, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Sir George Sampson. Murió el 5 de octubre de 1437, en Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultada en Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
